title: Require Role Selection When Inviting Users
story: As a product administrator, I want the system to require at least one role or permission to be selected before I can send an invitation, so that invited users always have a defined access level.
description: Add client-side validation to the invitation form that prevents sending an invitation without selecting at least one role or permission. Previously, it was possible to invite a user with no role and no permissions selected, which created an ambiguous access state.
acceptance_criteria: Invitation form requires at least one role or permission to be selected
Attempting to submit without a selection shows a validation error
Valid invitations with roles selected continue to work normally
ux_changes: Client-side validation message when attempting to invite without role/permission selection.
implementation_notes: Client-side JavaScript validation check on the invitation form submission.
comment_summary: Developer implemented the validation and pushed to staging for review.
